# Aurelius Node 01 - Texas Regional Industrial & Logistics Ground-Truth Node

> Real-time, machine-readable ground-truth oracle for Texas industrial materials, energy benchmarks, regional hotshot freight rates, and supply logistics.

## System Manifest & Metadata
- Protocol: x402 / EIP-3009 (Micropayment Gated)
- Settlement Network: Base Mainnet
- Unit Currency: USDC ($0.05 per request)
- Agent Discovery Manifest: https://aurelius-node-01.onrender.com/.well-known/agent.json
- Health Endpoint: https://aurelius-node-01.onrender.com/health

## Primary Capabilities
- Industrial Inventory: Real-time pricing & stock for structural steel, OCTG casing, rebar, piping, aggregates, cement, and lumber.
- Regional Energy: EIA-indexed diesel and unleaded rack benchmarks across DFW, Houston, Permian Basin, San Antonio, and Corpus Christi.
- Regional Freight: Spot hotshot and flatbed expedited freight rates across major Texas shipping corridors.

## API Specification
### Query Supply Matrix
- Endpoint: GET /api/v1/supply
- Requirements: Requires valid x402 EIP-3009 signed payment header (`x-402-authorization`) authorizing $0.05 USDC to receiver wallet.
- Response Format: JSON (categorized tables covering inventory, fuel, freight, and timestamps).

## Developer & Operator
- Operator: Aurelius Autonomous Data Systems
- Region: Texas Regional Corridor (DFW / Permian / Gulf Coast / Central)
